note: TRIAL (revertible): the Year 2 team now shares a second full-team DOTT period at Tuesday P3, alongside their Thursday meeting. To make room, LA20's STEM moved to Tue P3-P4, LA21's STEM to Wed P2-P3 and LA21's Auslan to Thu P1; the Y3-4 team gains a third shared period as a side effect. Jasper Sirr-Davis carries three specialist periods on Wednesday (sanctioned exception).

Early morning learning first: Period 1 now carries almost no specialist lessons (down from 9 per week to 3 - the minimum possible given Chantel Uhe's fixed STEM doubles). Specialist DOTT and team meetings stack at P1, and specialists teach at close to full capacity from P2 onward. Most lessons have moved again - please re-check your week.
Cheryl Peak's Events leadership is now its own period at Thursday P1. Her Friday P1 stays as DOTT because she runs the whole-school assembly then.

More morning learning: team collaboration meetings now sit in the morning (Arts team moved from Wednesday P5 to P2). This frees afternoon specialist capacity, so three specialist sessions moved out of mornings across the school - classes keep more of the morning for core learning. Some lessons have moved; please re-check your week.

The relief period at T9 (Kindy) is gone: Lis Lowndes now covers Fiona Dyer's DOTT at Friday P1 (during assembly) instead, and Fiona teaches her own P6. All ECE DOTT is now provided in-house; Lis's surplus drops from +80 to +35.

Timetable redesign from staff feedback: every year team except Y4-5 now shares TWO full-team DOTT periods (up from one); Visual Art days are grouped by phase of learning (Monday Upper, Tuesday Lower) so resources stay set up; Monday P0-P1 and Friday P1 (assembly) are clear of specialist lessons; Anna Hendron's morning-heavy DOTT is fixed. Class DOTT totals are unchanged. Most specialist lessons have moved - please re-check your week.
Nikki Luca's Friday DOTT is now P5 (Katie Digney teaches) plus P6 (Lis Lowndes covers LA1); the small shortfall vs her entitlement is paid back outside the timetable.

DOTT equity: Nikki Luca's DOTT shortfall closed. LA15 STEM moved to Monday (with LA20 STEM) to free Lis Lowndes's Friday, so Lis now covers Nikki's LA1 across two periods (Fri P2-P3) instead of one. Nikki goes from 23 min under to slightly over; Lis's surplus drops from +95 to +50.

DOTT equity: Webb's (LA22) STEM moved to Monday P5-P6 so it now includes a Period 6, lifting Webb's release into line with the other graduate teachers. LA23 STEM moved to Tuesday P3-P4 and LA23 Visual Art to Monday P1 to make room. This also trims Lis Lowndes's DOTT surplus.

Friday Period 1 is kept clear of all specialist lessons for the whole-school assembly. STEM is now LA15 P2-P3 and LA21 P4-P5. Lis Lowndes still covers Nikki's LA1 (now at Friday P6); Fiona's T9 Kindy class is covered by a relief teacher at Friday P6.
Mobile: the Mon-Fri day switcher now sits directly above the timetable and stays pinned while scrolling, so you no longer scroll back up past the teacher list to change day.
Timetable published online so all staff can access it via one link. Each view is bookmarkable, and 'Print this timetable' exports just your page.
Monday Kindy relief: Anita Currion now covers Kelly Duggan (LA4) in P5-P6, with Currion's own DOTT moved to P1-P2.
New home landing page with rounded section tiles and a featured search.
Brand and layout refresh; Jake Pevitt added as the third PE teacher; teacher dashboard now shows 'DOTT periods received' for class teachers and 'Periods taught' for specialists.
